executives.name: Mark Widmar
executives.background: Mr. Widmar has served as our Chief Executive Officer since July 2016 and as a member of our board of directors since joining the company in 2011. He previously served as our Chief Financial Officer from 2011 to 2016.

executives.name: Alexander Bradley
executives.background: Mr. Bradley has served as our Chief Financial Officer since July 2016. He joined First Solar in 2008 and has held various roles in finance and corporate development.

executives.name: Georges Antoun
executives.background: Mr. Antoun has served as our Chief Commercial Officer since July 2016. He joined First Solar in 2012 and previously served as Chief Operating Officer.

executives.name: Caroline Stockdale
executives.background: Ms. Stockdale has served as our Chief Human Resources Officer since 2017. She has extensive experience in HR leadership across various industries.

executives.name: Jason Dymbort
executives.background: Mr. Dymbort has served as our General Counsel and Secretary since 2019. He joined First Solar in 2008.

board_of_directors.name: Mark Widmar
board_of_directors.background: Chief Executive Officer of First Solar, Inc. since July 2016.

board_of_directors.name: Michael Ahearn
board_of_directors.background: Co-founder of First Solar and served as CEO from 2000 to 2009 and again from 2011 to 2012. He is the Chairman of the Board.

board_of_directors.name: Richard Chapman
board_of_directors.background: Former CFO of Walton Enterprises, LLC. He has served on the board since 2012.

board_of_directors.name: George Hambro
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of First Solar. He has served on the board since 2012.

board_of_directors.name: Molly Joseph
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of UnitedHealthcare Global. She joined the board in 2021.

board_of_directors.name: William Post
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Pinnacle West Capital Corporation. He has served on the board since 2010.

board_of_directors.name: Paul Stebbins
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of World Fuel Services Corporation. He joined the board in 2014.

board_of_directors.name: Anita Sands
board_of_directors.background: Former Group Managing Director and Head of Change Leadership at UBS Financial Services. She joined the board in 2020.

sources.source_description: First Solar, Inc. Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
First Solar, Inc. Definitive Proxy Statement (DEF 14A)
